Third-party libraries vendored under this folder for offline use.

| File | Package | Version | License |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Sortable.min.js | sortablejs | 1.15.6 | MIT |
| jspdf.umd.min.js | jspdf | 2.5.2 | MIT |
| pdf-lib.min.js | pdf-lib | 1.17.1 | MIT |
| mammoth.browser.min.js | mammoth | 1.9.0 | BSD-2-Clause |
| html2canvas.min.js | html2canvas | 1.4.1 | MIT |

Downloaded from jsDelivr CDN mirrors of the published npm packages.
Do not edit minified files by hand. Re-fetch when bumping versions in index.html.
